title: How To Use YouTube Tags To Get More Views in 2026
description:
Wondering how to use YouTube tags the right way in 2026? Tags aren't what they used to be, but they still matter -- and knowing how to use them correctly can give your videos a small but meaningful boost in views.

In this video we break down how YouTube's algorithm has changed, why your title and description matter more than tags, and exactly how to choose the right tags for your videos. We cover how to mix broad keywords like "making money online" with specific ones like "4000 watch hours" to cast the widest net possible while still reaching viewers searching for exactly what your video covers.

If you're a newer creator trying to figure out YouTube SEO and how to get your videos found in search, this breaks it all down in a way that's simple and easy to apply.
